title: Beautify.
description: A vanilla+ modpack created to make Minecraft look and feel beautiful.
body:
Beautify is a vanilla+ modpack made to truly bring together the game for anyone who wants to play. It is meant to look and play beautifully. It adds new terrain generation, new hud, and new structures.

This mod will make your minecraft experience incredible. It has multiple shaders for your prefrence and pc build. If you want the vanilla minecraft experience with a beautiful new feel, this is for you.

This is very early and as of right now some mods including Better Nether and Better End are not avaliable for this version so it won't be on the modpack until they are updated.
